# homebrew-fileuni

Official Homebrew tap for FileUni CLI.

This repository is generated by the FileUni release workflow.
Do not edit generated formula files manually.

## What You Get

- Formula: `fileuni`
- Supported platforms:
  - macOS Apple Silicon
  - macOS Intel
  - Linux x86_64 (GNU libc)
  - Linux arm64 (GNU libc)

## Install

```bash
brew tap FileUni/fileuni
brew install fileuni
```

## Upgrade

```bash
brew update
brew upgrade fileuni
```

## Verify

```bash
fileuni --help
```

## Uninstall

```bash
brew uninstall fileuni
```

## Files

- Formula: `Formula/fileuni.rb`
- Install guide: `INSTALL.md`

## Release Source

Homebrew packages are generated from FileUni GitHub Release assets published at:

- `https://github.com/FileUni/FileUni-Project/releases`
